channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Hamster cage, 3rd April
item.description:
Hamster cage been dumped with hamster inside passed away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arran Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car, 3rd April
item.description:
No Tax & MOT has had a few tickets and not moved over a month.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chatsworth Avenue, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped Wood, 3rd April
item.description:
Flytipped pieces of wood,flytipped over 2 weeks ago. Location is towards end of Canbury Path,opposite the first house on Canbury Path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Canbury Path, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Already new potholes since previous repaiy, 3rd April
item.description:
Already a new potholes showing in the road at the junction on Worsley Bridge Road in Copers Cope
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greycot Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Contractors fly tipping their material waste in the Hotel Car Park, 3rd April
item.description:
For 2 weeks a roofing company has been fly tipping their waste materials into the car park of the hotel. They just dump their materials there and the hotel is forced to have it removed which costs money. The last incident was 6th March

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackwall Lane, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water river fly tip, 3rd April
item.description:
Water river saturated with dumped items and debris It’s time this area was tidied up I don’t know who to send this to but it does come under a green space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tv fly tipped, 3rd April
item.description:
Fly tipped TV

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Henningham Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa and a packing grate dumped, 3rd April
item.description:
A sofa and a large wooden crate has been left on the corner of witherston way and williambare foot drive se9

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): William Barefoot Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa left outside flats blocking pavement, 3rd April
item.description:
Sofa left with please take sign left outside flats blocking pavements
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ringers Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Covered over vehicle no car tax, 3rd April
item.description:
Suspicious completely covered over vehicle been parked for approx a week no vehicle tax stolen? abandoned? needs investigating asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Methuen Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike at end of claylands road, 3rd April
item.description:
Flat tyre, been here for a while and not moved

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Claylands Road, Oval, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned bicycle and broken scooter, 3rd April
item.description:
Have been here for months and are broken

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 366, Kennington Road, Kennington, Greater London

item.title: Tags on Stone Street Furniture, 3rd April
item.description:

item.title: Fly tipping around bins, 3rd April
item.description:
It is often bad and sad - It has gone really mad!!! Can something be done in a longer term way? Any bright ideas?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pitfield Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Allington needs sweeping again, 3rd April
item.description:
Please visit the collect dumped litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastic Recycling Litter, 3rd April
item.description:
There are lots of plastic items blowing around on the road which have been dropped by the team who emptied the plastics recycling boxes this morning. This is a frequent occurrence-plastic items fall out of the recycling boxes when they are emptied and they are not picked up. The road looks more littered after plastics collection day than it did before!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durban Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicles left in parking spaces, 3rd April
item.description:
A number of vehicles without registration and tax status are abandoned in public parking spaces. These vehicles may be associated with the M&F garage. The vehicles are blocking the public from being able to use the public parking spaces along the road. Especially where there is a hospital nearby and people may require the parking to visit.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bull Lane, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plank of wood dumped outside 181, 3rd April
item.description:
Please collect wood
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: 3 fire extinguishers, 3rd April
item.description:
There are 3 fire extinguishers plus lots of rubbish.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
